info.title: MMS API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for Mosque Management System (MMS)

200.description: Account created. An OTP has been sent to your email for verification.

message.example: Account created. An OTP has been sent to your email for verification.

email: The email has already been taken.

post.summary: Send OTP to email for password reset

200.description: Request processed (OTP sent if email exists)

message.example: If the email exists, an OTP has been sent.

post.summary: Send invitation (only for new emails, no duplicate active invitations)

role.description: Available roles: super_admin, mosque_manager, halaqa_supervisor, teacher, parent

email: User already exists and has a role.
An active invitation already exists for this email.

role: You are not allowed to invite this role.

post.summary: Accept invitation and create account or attach role

name.description: Required only if user does not exist

password.description: Required only if user does not exist

password_confirmation.description: Required only if user does not exist
